findings.description: Document title block is incorrectly formatted as a running header.
findings.evidence: In the PDF, the title block ('FACT SHEET...') is centered and prominent. In the HTML, it is rendered as small, gray, left-aligned text at the top of the page, resembling a running header rather than the main document title.
The URL starting at the bottom of page 1 is colored blue and underlined in the PDF, but appears as plain text without link styling in the HTML.

findings.description: Headers and footers are inserted inline, disrupting reading order.
findings.evidence: On HTML page 2, the footer from page 1 and the header for page 2 are rendered inline between paragraphs of the main text, visually interrupting the continuous flow of the document.

findings.description: Loss of text indentation for the address block.
findings.evidence: The mailing address block ('Mr. Adam Ulishney...') is indented in the PDF but is left-aligned with the rest of the body text in the HTML.
